name: Dropbox
description: Manage Dropbox (file storage: list, download, upload, move, copy, delete, search, share, metadata) from any AI agent. 10 tools, OAuth2 token.
instructions:
This connector wraps the Dropbox API v2 (api.dropboxapi.com).

**Setup — OAuth2**:
1. Register at https://www.dropbox.com/developers/apps → **Create app** → 'Scoped access' → 'App folder' or 'Full Dropbox' depending on need.
2. Add the scopes you need (files.metadata.read, files.content.read, files.content.write, sharing.write, ...).
3. Generate a **Refresh token** via OAuth flow with `token_access_type=offline`.
4. Set `DROPBOX_CLIENT_ID`, `DROPBOX_CLIENT_SECRET`, `DROPBOX_REFRESH_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: OAuth2 refresh handled by engine. Sends `Authorization: Bearer ACCESS_TOKEN`.

**Two API hosts**: most endpoints live at `api.dropboxapi.com/2`. Content endpoints (upload/download) use `content.dropboxapi.com/2` — out of scope here for upload (multipart streaming). Use the link-based pattern: have content already accessible via URL → use `dropbox_save_url` to ingest, or use external upload then create_shared_link to share.

**Path format**: paths use `/Folder/Subfolder/File.txt` (case-insensitive, no leading drive). Root is empty string or `/`. For App-folder apps, paths are relative to the app folder.

**Pagination**: most list endpoints use a `cursor` returned in the response. Pass back as `cursor` to continue.

**Rate limits**: per-endpoint quotas, generally 100-1000 req/min. 429 with `Retry-After`.

**Out of scope here**: direct file upload (multipart, separate API), Paper docs, team admin, the legacy v1 API.

tools.name: dropbox_get_current_account
tools.description: Return the authenticated user's account (account_id, name, email, country, locale, account_type).

tools.name: dropbox_list_folder
tools.description: List contents of a folder. Use `recursive=true` to walk subfolders.

path.description: Path like '/My Folder' or '' for root.

tools.name: dropbox_get_metadata
tools.description: Get metadata for a single file/folder at a path.

tools.name: dropbox_search
tools.description: Search files by query within a path. Filter by file extension, category.

path.description: Restrict to this folder ('' for root).

file_categories.description: Array: image, document, pdf, spreadsheet, presentation, audio, video, folder, ...

tools.name: dropbox_create_folder
tools.description: Create a folder at a path.

autorename.description: If true, append a counter on conflict.

tools.name: dropbox_move
tools.description: Move a file/folder to a new path.

tools.name: dropbox_copy
tools.description: Copy a file/folder to a new path.

tools.name: dropbox_create_shared_link
tools.description: Create a public shared link for a file/folder.
